zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Picquigny於1200年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆皮易尼時，她的父親Enguerrand de Picquigny II29歲，母親Marguerite de Ponthieu27歲。她和Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1249年在法國皮卡迪索姆海利享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Picquigny于1200年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆皮易尼时，她的父亲Enguerrand de Picquigny II29岁，母亲Marguerite de Ponthieu27岁。她和Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1249年在法国皮卡迪索姆海利享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Picquigny was born in 1200, in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, was 29 and her mother, Marguerite de Ponthieu, was 27. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly. She died in 1249, in Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Picquigny est née en 1200, à Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Ponthieu, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly. Elle est décédée en 1249, à Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Picquigny 1200 in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Enguerrand de Picquigny II 29 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Ponthieu 27. Sie hatte mit Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1249 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Picquigny è nata il nel 1200 nel Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Ponthieu, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly. Morì nel 1249, nel Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Picquignyが1200年にフランスピカーディソンメピククイグニーで生まれた時，父Enguerrand de Picquigny IIは29歳，母Marguerite de Ponthieuは27歳であった。彼女はSeigneur Thibaud III de Heillyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1249年にフランスピカーディソンメヘイリーで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Picquigny(이)가 1200년 프랑스 피카디 솜 피c키그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Enguerrand de Picquigny II(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Ponthieu(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 프랑스 피카디 솜 헤이리에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Picquigny nasceu em 1200, em Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Ponthieu, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly. Ela faleceu em 1249, em Heilly, Somme, Picardie, França, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Picquigny родилась в 1200 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Enguerrand de Picquigny II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Ponthieu, 27. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly. Она умерла в 1249 г. в местности хилли, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Picquigny nació en 1200, en Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Ponthieu, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly. Murió en 1249, en Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 49 años.
